ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "size_numeric" INTEGER /* Numeric representation of the size (e.g., 25, 26) */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip" INTEGER /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "thigh" REAL /* Thigh measurement in inches */,
  "chest" INTEGER /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_width" INTEGER /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "inseam" INTEGER /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length measurement in inches */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the size belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand is headquartered */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the product is available in */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., T-Shirt, Jeans, Dress) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material(s) used in the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is designed for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the product is designed for (e.g., Adult, Child) */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be triggered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Manager, Staff) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer (optional, for future integration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
column_names: ID of the brand the size belongs to
Country where the brand is headquartered
ID of the brand the product belongs to
ID of the size the product is available in
Quantity of the product in stock

Timestamp of the last update to the product record
Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Manager, Staff)
Timestamp of when the user account was created

ID of the customer (optional, for future integration)
